note: Figma MCP (use_figma / get_metadata / get_screenshot via the Figma plugin server) was confirmed working in this session and used to inspect and mutate the file directly, across five build passes (passes 4-5 via /loop dynamic self-pacing) in one continuous session. The file already contained a substantial pre-existing design system (20 pages, 4 variable collections with Light+High Contrast modes, 6 text styles, 2 effect styles, and 6 Component Sets) that prior GAP_REPORT entries had incorrectly described as never built. Pass 1: added 8 Component Sets, reconciled brand color, built the first real pattern board. Pass 2: added a PG ERD Icon set, a real Login Flow, real prototype reactions on the Core Flow. Pass 3: traversed real KRDS pages via WebFetch, added 8 more Component Sets (incl. the two required by the completion criteria: generic Modal, Header), 2 more pattern boards, rebuilt Accessibility Lab around real objects, added a KRDS Source Inventory table, found a real shared-TEXT-property-default Plugin API bug. Pass 4: added 3 real Grid Styles with visible column overlays, and the file's first Boolean + Instance Swap component properties on PG ERD Button. Pass 5 (spec updated by user to add a Visual QA requirement): added a dedicated 17. Visual QA page with real evidence boards (Core Components, Component States, Before & After Fixes); the QA loop caught and fixed a live recurrence of the shared-TEXT-property-default bug on Input Field/Text Area state instances. All additions verified with get_screenshot after creation. See docs/GAP_REPORT.md for what remains open.
